what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only channel-memory attachment record that links attachment id att-a3879fec to board item item-2b7454ed in the dragnet-development channel, recording the creation timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-2b7454ed.
standouts: Uses a board:// URI to target a specific board item.
Acts as a lightweight cross-reference bridge between channel memory and a board item.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Includes id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References external entities with a URI scheme (board://).
notes: A channel-memory attachment stub that points to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or state does the referenced board item item-2b7454ed represent?

purpose_vs_actual: No explicit stated purpose is given, but the record's content matches the expected role of a board-item attachment: it records a timestamped link to a board item.
intention_signals: It seems intended to register a board item as an attachment within the dragnet-development channel memory ledger so the board item can be discovered and correlated with channel context.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme as the target value for a board-item attachment.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped pointer from a channel attachment to a specific board item, enabling later queries to correlate channel memory with board entries.
